The '''KT-400 military droid carrier''' was a [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]], and a common sight throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] both before and after the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Characteristics==
[[File:KT-400_military_droid_carrier.jpg|thumb|left|200px|A KT-400 military droid carrier unloads [[Sentinel droid]]s on [[Onderon/Legends|Onderon]].]]
The freighter was fairly compact, and was arranged in a three-pronged shape. One prong held the bridge, and the other two, extending below, may have served a purpose in cargo handling. Its only obvious armament was two pairs of [[Laser cannon/Legends|laser cannons]], mounted at the ends of the lower projections. It was used to escort [[Sentinel droid]]s into battle or occupation.

==History==
Originally designed by [[Kellenech Technologies]], a droid manufacturer, this ship was supposed to carry its military and construction droids. But when it bankrupted, the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] took the design and began production of the ships through [[Republic Fleet Systems]]. However, after the [[Great Sith War/Legends|Great Sith War]] the funding stopped and a variety of manufacturers was contracted to finish the vessels for military and commercial use.

The freighter was used by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], as well as the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] enemies, not to mention the civilian use . One of its most memorable uses was at the [[battle of Dxun]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]], when many of these freighters were used to drop [[Sentinel droid|Sentinel]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] onto the moon to combat the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] invaders. They were also used to shuttle [[Kolto/Legends|kolto]] from [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] and to deliver supplies to the Sith military base on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]]. Ironically enough, the Zhug brothers would crash their own KT-400 on Dxun years later when attempting to collect a bounty on the Jedi Exile.

The freighter was very popular with mercenaries and bounty hunters for its large cargo hold and armament.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]''
